Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all root causes of garbled output and LLM non-response

Six bugs confirmed and fixed via 4-agent investigation:

1. Quality gate used is_ascii_punctuation() which rejected ALL Unicode punctuation
   (em-dash, smart quotes, §, ©, •, accented letters) — silently discarding entire
   chunks from most real-world PDFs and leaving the LLM with no context to answer.
   Fixed: use same printable definition as is_printable_pdf_char() with 20% threshold.

2. Sampler: temp=0.2 + penalties(1.25, 0.2, 0.2) caused logit collapse — after
   aggressive freq/presence penalties suppressed tokens and temperature sharpened
   the distribution, dist() had no valid candidates → empty or garbage output.
   Fixed: temp=0.6, penalties(1.1, 0.0, 0.0) — only repeat penalty, no freq/presence.

3. lopdf emits literal "?Identity-H Unimplemented?" strings for fonts without a
   ToUnicode CMap. These passed all filters, reached the LLM, and were echoed back
   as "encrypted" garbage. Fixed: strip the placeholder in parse_pdf before cleaning.

4. best_excerpt() returned raw chunk text without PUA/control-char sanitization,
   causing garbage to appear in SourceCard, ContextPanel, and DocumentViewer.
   Fixed: sanitize with same filter as ask_saul before returning excerpt.

5. "Answer:" priming prefix was not stripped from the response if the model echoed
   it back. Fixed: strip_prefix("Answer:") after the existing artifact cleanup.

6. Sentences larger than chunk_size (PDFs extracted as one long line) were added
   to the current chunk without splitting, creating chunks 2-4x the target size.
   Fixed: sub-split sentences exceeding chunk_size before chunking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: hardcode clipping ShapeItem instead of searching ymmp for template

Clipping shape (Layer 10) parameters are now hardcoded since the template
won't exist in a fresh ymmp. Removes findClippingTemplate and all
template-based coordinate lookups — uses constants directly.

commit.message:
fix: Fix Dashboard total services calculation and translate UI

Fix the Dashboard displaying 0 for Total Services and translate UI to English:

Dashboard Fixes:
- Fix total services calculation to show ALL services (not just current year)
- Add Number() conversion for all monetary values to prevent string concatenation
- Show "All time" total with current year amount in parentheses
- Add null checking for date parsing
- Fix potential NaN issues with montant and total fields

UI Translation:
- Translate all Dashboard labels to English:
  - "Tableau de bord" → "Dashboard"
  - "Total Prestations" → "Total Services"
  - "Paiements Encaissés" → "Received Payments"
  - "Paiements en Attente" → "Pending Payments"
  - "Montant en Attente" → "Pending Amount"
  - "Clients Actifs" → "Active Clients"
  - "Types de Prestations" → "Service Types"
  - "Prestations Non Payées" → "Unpaid Services"
  - "Activité Récente" → "Recent Activity"
- Update activity descriptions (Prestation → Service, Paiement → Payment)
- Translate loading and empty state messages

The issue was that:
1. Dashboard only showed current year (2026) but services were from other years
2. Monetary values weren't explicitly converted to numbers

Now displays:
- Total for all services regardless of year
- Current year amount shown in parentheses if applicable
- All values properly converted to numbers

Deployed to: https://jicompta.web.app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(k3s): enable IPv4 forwarding for cross-node pod traffic

The k3s module set net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding but not
net.ipv4.ip_forward. Server nodes got IPv4 forwarding from the
Tailscale module, but rivendell (Tailscale disabled due to r8169
driver bug) had ip_forward=0, causing all cross-node pod traffic
to rivendell to be silently dropped.

This broke Traefik (samwise) -> backend pods on rivendell (Forgejo,
Bifrost, Headscale, Open-WebUI), manifesting as 504 gateway timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Optimize hot-path algorithms: O(1) ID gen, neighbor cache, set/deque BFS

- graphObject: replace max(dict.keys()) ID generator with module counter;
  cache allNeighbors with dirty-flag invalidation; use __allNeighborIds set
  for O(1) dedup in addNeighbor and fast early-exit in removeNeighbor
- geographyHelper: convert forestFireFillGraphObject to deque + set (O(n)
  BFS); findContiguousGroupsOfGraphObjects passes a set; eliminate
  per-neighbor flatFireQueue list rebuild in weightedForestFireFillGraphObject
  with a _queuedSet mirror; fix O(n²) group-membership filter with groupSet
- redistrictingGroup: getNeighborsForGraphObjectsInList uses set lookups
  instead of nested O(n) list scans; fillPopulationEnergyGraph converts
  remainingObjects and blocksActedUpon to sets for O(1) discard/membership

All 67 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: Xvfb + x11grab + filterComplex architecture

- yt-dlp pipes HLS 301 directly to ffmpeg (seek via --download-sections)

- x11grab is infinite: if HLS dies, live continues with black
- No atomic swap, no separate streamer process

fix: 修复多个制作人交互问题

1. Agent 上下文盲区：sequential loop 中每个 agent 调用前动态拼接
   本章节已有讨论（producer 回答 + 前序 agent 发言），确保主策划等
   后序角色能读到上文而非重新开始

2. 决策卡错误问题：移除 _extract_questions_for_producer 调用，该函数
   会把讨论中任意问句当作决策卡问题显示，现在只有 @超级制作人 显式
   标记或活跃 checkpoint 才触发问题模式

3. 多个 @超级制作人 问题修复：parse_super_producer_mentions 改为收集
   所有标记而非仅第一个，支持 LP 一次提多个问题

4. 顺序执行暂停：检测到 @超级制作人 后立即暂停等待 producer 回应，
   移除 _inject_user_messages 避免消息重复广播

commit.message:
Improve LLM frontend prompt: array example and register reuse guard

The LLM occasionally confused register names with values (e.g. using %3
as index 3 when it held value 1). Added an array initialization worked
example showing each value/index needs its own CONST register, and an
explicit rule that register names are arbitrary identifiers with no
relationship to the values stored. Also added type inference output to
the HLASM bubble sort demo script.

Add DSL builders for EditorState and TransactionSpec (#7)

- Add EditorStateDsl.kt with EditorStateConfig builder and editorState {} DSL
- Add TransactionDsl.kt with TransactionSpec builder DSL
- Add dispatch {} DSL extension on EditorSession for building and dispatching transactions inline
- Mark TODO #7 as DONE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(auth+perf+security): auth redirect flow, signout error handling, timing-safe cron, ESLint fixes

Auth flow:
- Sign-in fallbackRedirectUrl → /dashboard (eliminates extra hop through landing page)
- Sign-up fallbackRedirectUrl → /select-org (new users need to pick/create org first)
- Updated Clerk env vars to match

Signout error handling (3-layer defense):
- NavigationErrorGuard: catches both sync errors + unhandled rejections across 13 known
  signout error patterns (RSC stream failures, chunk load errors, network errors)
- error.tsx: detects signout-related errors and silently redirects instead of showing 500 page
- global-error.tsx: same treatment for top-level boundary

Security:
- Timing-safe CRON_SECRET comparison via shared lib/verify-cron-secret.ts (prevents
  secret enumeration via response-time side-channel) — applied to all 4 cron/admin routes

Performance:
- LazyNexusIntro client wrapper for dynamic import with ssr:false
- DAL: combined board findUnique + membership check into single query
- db.ts: combined 2 RLS session var queries into 1
- Prisma: composite indexes on (boardId, order) and (listId, order)

ESLint/React Compiler fixes:
- organization/[orgId]/page.tsx: replaced setState-in-effect with lazy initializer
- board-list.tsx: suppressed false-positive exhaustive-deps for server-provided prop
- jest.polyfills.ts: suppressed no-require-imports for CJS polyfill file

commit.message:
fix: guarantee user is set before navigation after login/register

Previously signIn() and signUp() returned {} as soon as
signInWithPassword resolved, relying on the async onAuthStateChange
callback to set the user. If that callback's DB fetch returned null
(missing profile row, anon-key permission, or timing race), the layout
guard saw isLoading=false + user=null and redirected back to /login.

Changes:
- fetchOrCreateUser promoted to useCallback so it's accessible
  outside useEffect
- signIn() now calls getSession() + fetchOrCreateUser after
  signInWithPassword, setting user before returning {}
- signUp() does the same after the post-registration signInWithPassword
- onAuthStateChange SIGNED_IN handler now skips the DB fetch if user
  is already set (same account), avoiding a redundant round-trip
- Handles TOKEN_REFRESHED event to rehydrate user after token refresh
  if user slot is empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add CommunityState for incremental updates with hierarchy

CommunityState wraps PartitionState to provide a persistent,
serializable community detection state that supports incremental
graph updates via delta edge lists.

Key features:
- initial() runs full Leiden and captures hierarchy levels
- update() applies delta edges incrementally, updating level 0
- hierarchy_levels() exposes the multi-level community structure
- community_tree() derives parent-child relationships via majority vote
- into_parts()/from_parts() for decomposed storage and restoration

Hierarchy support enables DRIFT search (top-down traversal of community
tree for progressive query refinement).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix QB XML query error — filter open sales orders in parser instead of invalid QBXML tag

StatusFilter is not a valid QBXML element for SalesOrderQueryRq.
Now filters in the parser by skipping closed/invoiced orders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct agent_end and before_prompt_build hook signatures

Both lifecycle hooks were reading from the wrong argument. The real SDK
signature is handler(event, ctx) — messages live on event.messages, not
on ctx, and ctx has no userId field.

- agent_end: extract user/assistant text from event.messages array
  (walk backwards for latest of each role); use 'default' for userId
- before_prompt_build: use event.prompt as the recall query instead of
  ctx.latestUserMessage (which doesn't exist)
- Add extractLatestMessages() + extractTextContent() helpers
- Add stripInjectedBlocks() to remove <relevant_memories>…</relevant_memories>
  from user messages before capture, preventing auto-recall injections
  from triggering the security sanitizer and silently dropping turns
- Add registerLifecycleHook() helper that tries api.on() then api.registerHook()
- Fix tests to use real (event, ctx) two-argument call signature
- Add test: auto-capture strips injected recall blocks before sanitization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: improve library usability with serde, builders, and run_simple

- Add conditional serde derives behind "serde" feature flag
- Make graph_source Optional in RunConfig (library users don't need it)
- Add builder methods: with_mode, with_resolution, with_max_iterations,
  with_quality_tolerance
- Add run_simple() entry point for edges-in, partition-out usage
- Re-export PartitionResult, PartitionState, CommunityRelation,
  CommunityState from crate root
- Gate CLI module behind "cli" feature
